nodes.text: How Much Does TikTok Pay Per View?
Platform payments are just the beginning. Here's the complete TikTok income picture.
How Much Does TikTok Pay Per View?
TikTok's Creator Rewards Program pays approximately

— a fraction of YouTube's RPM. A video with 1 million views earns just $20–$40 from the platform itself. But that same video might unlock brand sponsorships worth $2,000–$10,000. The real TikTok income story is about what views enable, not what they directly pay.
TikTok creators with 500K followers typically earn 90–95% of their income from brand deals, affiliate marketing, and digital products — not from Creator Rewards.
TikTok Earnings at Key View Milestones
Estimate Creator Rewards income and sponsorship potential based on your follower count and monthly views.

The official TikTok marketplace connects brands with creators for paid collaborations. Available at 10,000+ followers, it provides a structured channel to land brand deals at rates far exceeding Creator Rewards.
Use our free calculator to estimate your potential income based on your numbers.
Free tool · No sign-up required · Instant results
How much does TikTok pay for 1 million views?
The Creator Rewards Program pays roughly $20–$40 for 1 million views. However, a 1M-view video may unlock brand deals worth $2,000–$10,000 and affiliate commissions of $500–$5,000 on top of that.
Is TikTok Creator Rewards the same as the Creator Fund?
No. The Creator Rewards Program replaced the original Creator Fund in 2023 and pays up to 20× more per view by rewarding original, longer-form, high-engagement content.
Creator Rewards are paid monthly, typically between the 15th–20th. Brand deals and affiliate payments vary by agreement, usually 7–30 days after campaign completion.

TikTok's per-view platform payments are low — but the platform's viral growth mechanics and brand deal economy make it one of the most valuable for building a creator business quickly. Focus on engagement over views, and treat Creator Rewards as a bonus, not a primary income source.
